zh.Blymhill, Staffordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布萊爾
zh.Broseley, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾布洛瑟利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill於大約1182年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布萊爾時，他的父親William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley53歲，母親Ivetta Bramshall48歲。他於大約1203年與Margery de Burwardeslegh在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布洛瑟利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在英國斯塔福爾布萊爾。

zh-hans.Blymhill, Staffordshire, England, United: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾布萊爾
zh-hans.Broseley, Shropshire, England: 英国英格兰史洛普爾布洛瑟利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill于大约1182年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布萊爾时，他的父亲William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley53岁，母亲Ivetta Bramshall48岁。他于大约1203年与Margery de Burwardeslegh在英国英格兰史洛普爾布洛瑟利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在英国斯塔福爾布萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bagot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Baggett   (see also   Baggott  ), from a pet form of   Bagg   2.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill was born about 1182, in Blymhill, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley, was 53 and his mother, Ivetta Bramshall, was 48. He married Margery de Burwardeslegh about 1203, in Broseley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in Blymhill, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill est né environ 1182, à Blymhill, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Ivetta Bramshall, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Burwardeslegh environ 1203, à Broseley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé à Blymhill, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill um 1182 in Blymhill, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley 53 und seine Mutter Ivetta Bramshall 48. Er hat um 1203 in Broseley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Margery de Burwardeslegh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Blymhill, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill è nato il circa 1182 nel Blymhill, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Ivetta Bramshall, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Margery de Burwardeslegh circa 1203, nel Broseley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Blymhill, Staffordshire, England.

ja.Blymhill, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアブリムヒル
ja.lifeSummary: John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhillが約1182年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブリムヒルで生まれた時，父William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromleyは53歳，母Ivetta Bramshallは48歳であった。約1203年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブローセリーでMargery de Burwardesleghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリススタフォードシュアイアブリムヒルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill(이)가 대략 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블림힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Ivetta Bramshall(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 브로즈리에서 Margery de Burwardeslegh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 스태퍼드실르 블림힐에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Blymhill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Ivetta Bramshall, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery de Burwardeslegh aproximadamente 1203, em Broseley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em Blymhill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill родился около 1182 г. в местности блимхилл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Ivetta Bramshall, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Burwardeslegh около 1203 г. в местности бросели, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в местности блимхилл, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill nació aproximadamente 1182, en Blymhill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Ivetta Bramshall, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Margery de Burwardeslegh aproximadamente 1203, en Broseley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Blymhill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
